title: After the All Comers: Win and Run Wild

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woo! I beat Turbo! Yippee! Hip, hip, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But Turbo was amazing today! I could seriously
feel how much she wanted to w—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! Speak of the devil!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Aaaugh! Why, why, whyyy?! I totally almost had
it!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa. She practically flew out of here...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wait, isn't the station the other way?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: T-Turbo! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm totally gonna win next tiiime! Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Turbo! That's the way to Ibaraki!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I can't run anymore...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Where am I anyway?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Um... H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew! There you are! I lost sight of you for a
minute and almost freaked out!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the way to the academy! It's the total
opposite!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's a bus stop over there, so let's take the bus
back.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! Thank goodness you came! I was sooo
scared!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww! There, there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Are you thirsty? I've got some juice.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm super thirsty! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Twin Turbo falls asleep from
exhaustion, so Matikanetannhauser gives her a
piggyback ride back home.
